title: Hybrid schema: some fields embed, others associate
prompt: Build MyApp.Accounts.User where: (1) :preferences are an embedded_schema (embeds_one) because they are single-parent, never queried independently (UI-specific), (2) :audit_log is an association (has_many) because entries must persist beyond the user lifetime and are queried cross-user for security reports. Write Preferences + AuditLogEntry + User to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex and the supporting migration for audit_log_entries to priv/repo/migrations/20260414300000_create_audit_log_entries.exs.
tier_rationale: Legendary because the modeling call per field requires domain reasoning about ephemeral-vs-persistent and single-vs-multi-parent. Sonnet often uses the same pattern for both.
research_citation: Ecto embedded schemas guide: 'a record can only be embedded in a single parent, you can't model a many-to-many relationship with embedded records.'
